text: Immersed among thoughtful minds, there is an infectious energy in the air—part anticipatory, part contemplative. The discussions flutter between seriousness and humor, echoing the complexities of knowledge and human connection. I feel a sense of possibility, tinged with gentle uncertainty, as if standing at the threshold of new insights. Surrounded by conversations about research and philosophical curiosity, I am both inspired and humbled, aware of my role in an unfolding collective inquiry.
